title: LLM inference
description: Text generation via a large language model. The interface is fixed; the provider (and therefore the operational footprint) is a scaffold-time choice.

python.wiring: Provide LLMClient() to your composition root (e.g. dependencies.py get_text_generator) typed as the TextGenerator protocol from core.llm, and call generate_text() from your service.

go.wiring: Construct llm.NewClient() in cmd/api/main.go and pass it (typed as the service.TextGenerator interface) into your service. Run `go mod tidy` if a provider added a dependency.
